channel.title: Diego Lopes | Data Engineer & AI Researcher
channel.description: Recent content on Diego Lopes | Data Engineer & AI Researcher

item.title: Automated Translation of Natural Language Geospatial Queries into SQL
item.description: This project develops a fine-tuned LLM to translate natural language queries into geospatial SQL, addressing current text-to-SQL limitations.

item.title: High-Throughput IoT Data Platform
item.description: Production Cassandra deployment supporting 1M+ connected devices with 13μs write latency, 99.99% availability, and 30% cost advantage over AWS managed alternatives.

item.title: TF-IDF - An approach to determine the relevance of word in a corpus.
item.description: How to create and interpret the TF-IDF matrix.

item.title: Matrix Multiplication Optimization in C
item.description: High-performance matrix multiplication achieving 10x+ speedup through blocking, vectorization, and SIMD optimization techniques on modern CPU architectures.
